infringements.steward_decision_summary: 2026 BRITISH GRAND PRIX 03 - 05 July 2026 The driver and team representative are required to report to the Stewards at 17:50, in relation to the incident below: The Stewards From The Stewards To The Team Manager, Atlassian Williams F1 Team Document 20 Date 03 July 2026 Time 17:37 No / Driver 23 - Al

raw_text_excerpt:
2026 BRITISH GRAND PRIX
03 - 05 July 2026
The driver and team representative are required to report to the Stewards at 17:50, in relation to the
incident below:
 
The Stewards
From The Stewards
To The Team Manager,
Atlassian Williams F1 Team
Document 20
Date 03 July 2026
Time 17:37
No / Driver 23 - Alexander Albon
Reason Alleged breach of Article 12.2.1.i of the FIA International Sporting Code in
combination with the Race Director’s Competition Notes (Item 1, Document 5) and
Document 17 – Driving unnecessarily slowly during Sprint Qualifying. 
Gerd Ennser Tanja Geilhausen
Mathieu Remmerie Pedro Lamy
Richard Norbury
